info.title: Codex API
info.description:
REST API for Codex, a digital library server for comics, manga, and ebooks.

## Interactive API Documentation

You can explore and test this API interactively:

- **Hosted Documentation**: Visit [codex.4sh.dev/docs/api](https://codex.4sh.dev/docs/api) for the full API reference
- **Your Instance**: If you have Scalar UI enabled, access `/api/docs` on your Codex server

## Authentication

Most endpoints require authentication. Codex supports two authentication methods:

1. **JWT Bearer Token**: Obtain a token via `POST /api/v1/auth/login`, then include it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
2. **API Key**: Generate an API key in the web UI or via the API, then include it as `X-API-Key: <key>` header

## OPDS Support

Codex provides OPDS catalog feeds for e-reader applications:

- **OPDS 1.2** (Atom XML): `/opds/v1/catalog` - Compatible with most e-readers
- **OPDS 2.0** (JSON): `/opds/v2` - Modern JSON-based format with enhanced features

post.summary: Trigger orphan cleanup task
post.description:
Enqueues a background task to scan and delete orphaned files
(thumbnails and covers without database entries).

# Permission Required
- Admin access required

Returns the task ID which can be used to track progress.

delete.summary: Delete orphaned files immediately (synchronous)
delete.description:
Scans for and deletes orphaned files immediately, returning
the results. For large numbers of files, prefer using the
async trigger_cleanup endpoint instead.

# Permission Required
- Admin access required

get.summary: Get statistics about orphaned files
get.description:
Scans the thumbnail and cover directories for files that don't have
corresponding database entries. This is a read-only operation.

# Permission Required
- Admin access required

# Query Parameters
- `include_files`: If true, includes the list of orphaned files in the response

parameters.name: include_files
parameters.description: Include list of orphaned files in response

post.summary: Trigger analysis of a single book (force reanalysis)
post.description:
# Permission Required
- `books:write`

# Behavior
Enqueues an AnalyzeBook task with force=true.
Returns immediately with a task_id to track progress.

post.summary: Trigger analysis of a book if not already analyzed
post.description:
# Permission Required
- `books:write`

# Behavior
Enqueues an AnalyzeBook task with force=false if the book has not been analyzed yet.
Returns 400 if the book is already analyzed.
Returns immediately with a task_id to track progress.

get.summary: Download book file
get.description:
Streams the original book file (CBZ, CBR, EPUB, PDF) for download.
Used by OPDS clients for acquisition links.

put.description:
Completely replaces all metadata fields. Omitted or null fields will be cleared.
If no metadata record exists, one will be created.

patch.description:
Only provided fields will be updated. Absent fields are unchanged.
Explicitly null fields will be cleared.
If no metadata record exists, one will be created with the provided fields.

get.summary: Subscribe to real-time entity change events via SSE
get.description:
Clients can subscribe to this endpoint to receive real-time notifications
about entity changes (books, series, libraries) happening in the system.

## Authentication
Requires valid authentication with `LibrariesRead` permission.

## Event Format
Events are sent as JSON-encoded `EntityChangeEvent` objects with the following structure:
```json
{
  "type": "book_created",
  "book_id": "uuid",
  "series_id": "uuid",
  "library_id": "uuid",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-06T12:00:00Z",
  "user_id": "uuid"
}
```

## Keep-Alive
A keep-alive message is sent every 15 seconds to prevent connection timeout.

200.description: SSE stream of entity change events

post.summary: Trigger forced analysis of all books in a library
post.description:
# Permission Required
- `libraries:write`

# Behavior
Enqueues AnalyzeBook tasks (with force=true) for ALL books in the library.
This forces re-analysis even for books that have been analyzed before.
Returns immediately with a task_id to track progress.

post.summary: Trigger analysis of unanalyzed books in a library
post.description:
# Permission Required
- `libraries:write`

# Behavior
Enqueues AnalyzeBook tasks (with force=false) for books that have not been analyzed yet.
This is useful for recovering from failures or analyzing newly discovered books.
Returns immediately with a task_id to track progress.

get.summary: Get current task metrics
get.description:
Returns real-time task performance statistics including:
- Summary metrics across all task types
- Per-task-type breakdown with timing, throughput, and error rates
- Queue health metrics (pending, processing, stale counts)

# Permission Required
- `libraries:read` or admin status

delete.summary: Delete all task metrics
delete.description:
Permanently deletes all task metric records from the database
and clears in-memory aggregates. This action cannot be undone.

# Permission Required
- Admin status required

post.summary: Trigger manual metrics cleanup
post.description:
Deletes metric records older than the configured retention period.
This operation normally runs automatically daily.

# Permission Required
- Admin status required

get.summary: Get task metrics history
get.description:
Returns historical task performance data for trend analysis.
Data is aggregated by hour or day depending on the granularity parameter.

# Permission Required
- `libraries:read` or admin status

get.summary: Subscribe to real-time task progress events via SSE
get.description:
Clients can subscribe to this endpoint to receive real-time notifications
about background task progress (analyze_book, generate_thumbnails, etc.).

## Authentication
Requires valid authentication with `LibrariesRead` permission.

## Event Format
Events are sent as JSON-encoded `TaskProgressEvent` objects with the following structure:
```json
{
  "task_id": "uuid",
  "task_type": "analyze_book",
  "status": "running",
  "progress": {
    "current": 5,
    "total": 10,
    "message": "Processing book 5 of 10"
  },
  "started_at": "2024-01-06T12:00:00Z",
  "library_id": "uuid"
}
```

## Keep-Alive
A keep-alive message is sent every 15 seconds to prevent connection timeout.

200.description: SSE stream of task progress events

post.summary: Generate thumbnails for books in a scope
post.description:
This queues a fan-out task that enqueues individual thumbnail generation tasks for each book.

**Scope priority:**
1. If `series_id` is provided, only books in that series
2. If `library_id` is provided, only books in that library
3. If neither is provided, all books in all libraries

**Force behavior:**
- `force: false` (default): Only generates thumbnails for books that don't have one
- `force: true`: Regenerates all thumbnails, replacing existing ones

# Permission Required
- `tasks:write`

oneOf.description:
Series detection strategy (immutable after creation)
Options: series_volume, series_volume_chapter, flat, publisher_hierarchy, calibre, custom

name.description: Display name for the sharing tag (must be unique)

CreateSystemIntegrationRequest.description: Request to create a new system integration

scheduled_for.description: When to run the task (defaults to now)

email.description: Email address for the new account

oneOf.description: User role (reader, maintainer, admin). Defaults to reader if not specified.

CustomStrategyConfig.description:
Configuration for custom series strategy

Note: Volume/chapter extraction from filenames is handled by the book strategy,
not the series strategy. Use CustomBookConfig for regex-based volume/chapter parsing.

pattern.description:
Regex pattern with named capture groups for series detection
Supported groups: publisher, series, book
Example: "^(?P<publisher>[^/]+)/(?P<series>[^/]+)/(?P<book>.+)\\.(cbz|cbr|epub|pdf)$"

seriesNameTemplate.description:
Template for constructing series name from capture groups
Example: "{publisher} - {series}"

book_ids.description: List of book IDs that share this hash

created_at.description: When the duplicate was first detected

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content

id.description: Unique identifier for the duplicate group

updated_at.description: When the group was last updated

user_id.description: User who triggered the change (if applicable)

EntityChangeEvent.description: Complete entity change event with metadata

oneOf.description: Deleted books were purged from a series

EntityEvent.description: Specific event types for entity changes

EntityType.description: Type of entity that was changed

externalId.description: ID on the external source (if available)

updatedAt.description: When the link was last updated

ExternalLinkListResponse.description: Response containing a list of external links

createdAt.description: When the rating record was created

fetchedAt.description: When the rating was last fetched from the source

updatedAt.description: When the rating record was last updated

ExternalRatingListResponse.description: Response containing a list of external ratings

FeedMetadata.description:
OPDS 2.0 Feed Metadata

Metadata for navigation and publication feeds.

numberOfItems.description: Total number of items in the collection (for pagination)

FieldOperator.description: Operators for string and equality comparisons

name.description: Name of the file or directory

filenamePatterns.description:
Regex patterns for extracting series name from filename
Patterns are tried in order, first match wins

requireMetadata.description: If true, require metadata for series detection (no filename fallback)

force.description: If true, regenerate thumbnails even if they exist. If false (default), only generate missing thumbnails.

FullSeriesMetadataResponse.description: Full series metadata response including all related data

locks.description: Lock states for all metadata fields

readingDirection.description: Reading direction (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

status.description: Series status (ongoing, ended, hiatus, abandoned, unknown)

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman.

title.description: Series title (usually same as series name)

totalBookCount.description: Expected total book count (for ongoing series)

force.description: If true, regenerate all thumbnails even if they exist. If false (default), only generate missing thumbnails.

library_id.description: Library ID to generate thumbnails for (optional)

series_id.description: Series ID to generate thumbnails for (optional, takes precedence over library_id)

seriesCount.description: Number of series with this genre

GenreListResponse.description: Response containing a list of genres

Group.description:
A group containing navigation or publications

Groups allow organizing multiple collections within a single feed.

ImageLink.description:
Image link with optional dimensions

Used for cover images and thumbnails in publications.

InitializeSetupRequest.description: Initialize setup request - creates first admin user

email.description: Email address for the first admin user

password.description: Password for the first admin user

username.description: Username for the first admin user

InitializeSetupResponse.description: Initialize setup response - returns user and JWT token

IntegrationStatusResponse.description: Response after enabling or disabling an integration

IntegrationTestResult.description: Response from testing an integration connection

bookCount.description: Total number of books in this library

bookStrategy.description: Book naming strategy (filename, metadata_first, smart, series_name)

defaultReadingDirection.description: Default reading direction for books in this library (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

lastScannedAt.description: When the library was last scanned

numberStrategy.description: Book number strategy (file_order, metadata, filename, smart)

path.description: Filesystem path to the library root

seriesCount.description: Total number of series in this library

seriesStrategy.description: Series detection strategy (series_volume, series_volume_chapter, flat, etc.)

updatedAt.description: When the library was last updated

book_count.description: Number of books in this library

series_count.description: Number of series in this library

total_size.description: Total size of books in bytes (approx. 15GB)

LinkProperties.description: Additional properties that can be attached to links

numberOfItems.description: Number of items in the linked collection

total_duplicate_books.description: Total number of books that are duplicates

MarkReadResponse.description: Response for bulk mark as read/unread operations

MetadataLocks.description: Lock states for all lockable metadata fields

ageRating.description: Whether the age_rating field is locked

customMetadata.description: Whether the custom_metadata field is locked

imprint.description: Whether the imprint field is locked

language.description: Whether the language field is locked

publisher.description: Whether the publisher field is locked

readingDirection.description: Whether the reading_direction field is locked

status.description: Whether the status field is locked

summary.description: Whether the summary field is locked

title.description: Whether the title field is locked

titleSort.description: Whether the title_sort field is locked

totalBookCount.description: Whether the total_book_count field is locked

year.description: Whether the year field is locked

book_count.description: Total number of books across all libraries

library_count.description: Total number of libraries in the system

page_count.description: Number of pages across all books

series_count.description: Total number of series across all libraries

total_book_size.description: Total size of all books in bytes (approx. 50GB)

ModifySeriesSharingTagRequest.description: Add/remove single sharing tag from series request

NumberStrategy.description:
Book number strategy type for determining book ordering numbers

Determines how individual book numbers are resolved for sorting and display.

redirectUri.description: Redirect URI used in the authorization request

Opds2Feed.description:
OPDS 2.0 Feed

The main container for OPDS 2.0 data. A feed contains metadata,
links, and one of: navigation, publications, or groups.

Opds2Link.description:
OPDS 2.0 Link Object

Represents a link in an OPDS 2.0 feed, based on the Web Publication Manifest model.
Links can be templated using URI templates (RFC 6570).

href.description: The URI or URI template for the link

templated.description: Whether the href is a URI template

type.description: Media type of the linked resource

OrphanStatsDto.description: Statistics about orphaned files in the system

files.description: List of orphaned files with details

orphaned_covers.description: Number of orphaned cover files (no matching series in database)

orphaned_thumbnails.description: Number of orphaned thumbnail files (no matching book in database)

total_size_bytes.description: Total size of all orphaned files in bytes

OrphanStatsQuery.description: Query parameters for orphan stats endpoint

include_files.description: If true, include the full list of orphaned files in the response

OrphanedFileDto.description: Information about a single orphaned file

entity_id.description: The entity UUID extracted from the filename

path.description: Path to the orphaned file (relative to data directory)

size_bytes.description: Size of the file in bytes

data.description: The data items for this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

analysisError.description: Error message if book analysis failed
analysisError.example: Failed to parse CBZ: invalid archive

createdAt.description: When the book was added to the library

deleted.description: Whether the book has been soft-deleted

filePath.description: Filesystem path to the book file

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the book

oneOf.description: User's read progress for this book

readingDirection.description:
Effective reading direction (from series metadata, or library default if not set)
Values: ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon

updatedAt.description: When the book was last updated

data.description: The data items for this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

libraryName.description: Name of the library this series belongs to

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman, following Bruce Wayne's first year as a vigilante.

data.description: The data items for this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

data.description: The data items for this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages

PatchBookMetadataRequest.description:
PATCH request for partial update of book metadata

Only provided fields will be updated. Absent fields are unchanged.
Explicitly null fields will be cleared.

blackAndWhite.description: Whether the book is black and white

manga.description: Whether the book is manga format

summary.example: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham City.

PatchSeriesMetadataRequest.description:
PATCH request for partial update of series metadata

Only provided fields will be updated. Absent fields are unchanged.
Explicitly null fields will be cleared.

readingDirection.description: Reading direction (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

status.description: Series status (ongoing, ended, hiatus, abandoned, unknown)

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman.

totalBookCount.description: Expected total book count (for ongoing series)

PreviewScanResponse.description: Preview scan response showing detected series

PublicSettingDto.description:
Public setting DTO (for non-admin users)

A simplified setting DTO that only includes the key and value,
used for public display settings accessible to all authenticated users.

Publication.description:
OPDS 2.0 Publication Entry

Represents a single publication (book) in an OPDS 2.0 feed.

links.description: Links for the publication (acquisition, streaming, etc.)

oneOf.description:
Reading progress extension (Codex-specific)
This follows a similar pattern to other reading apps that extend OPDS 2.0

PublicationMetadata.description:
OPDS 2.0 Publication Metadata (schema.org based)

Metadata for a publication entry, based on schema.org vocabulary.

skipDepth.description: Number of directory levels to skip before series detection

storeSkippedAs.description: Metadata field to store skipped folder names (e.g., "publisher")

oldest_pending_age_ms.description: Age of oldest pending task in milliseconds

pending_count.description: Number of tasks waiting to run

ReadProgressListResponse.description: Response containing a list of reading progress records

ReadProgressResponse.description: Response containing reading progress for a book

completed_at.description: When the book was completed (if completed)

progress_percentage.description:
Progress as a percentage (0.0-1.0)
For EPUBs, this is the stored percentage from reflowable content
For other formats, this is calculated from current_page / total_pages

ReadingProgress.description:
Reading progress information for a publication

Custom extension for tracking reading progress in OPDS 2.0.
Compatible with reading apps that support progress sync.

isCompleted.description: Whether the book has been completed

totalPages.description: Total number of pages in the book

accessToken.description: JWT access token (if email confirmation not required)

message.description: Message about email verification if required
message.example: Please check your email to verify your account

ReplaceBookMetadataRequest.description:
PUT request for full replacement of book metadata

All metadata fields will be replaced with the values in this request.
Omitting a field (or setting it to null) will clear that field.

blackAndWhite.description: Whether the book is black and white

manga.description: Whether the book is manga format

summary.example: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham City after years abroad.

ReplaceSeriesMetadataRequest.description:
PUT request for full replacement of series metadata

All metadata fields will be replaced with the values in this request.
Omitting a field (or setting it to null) will clear that field.

readingDirection.description: Reading direction (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

status.description: Series status (ongoing, ended, hiatus, abandoned, unknown)

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman.

titleSort.description: Custom sort name for ordering (e.g., "Batman Year One" instead of "The Batman Year One")

totalBookCount.description: Expected total book count (for ongoing series)

errors.description: List of errors encountered during scan

filesProcessed.description: Number of files processed so far

status.description: Current status of the scan (scanning, completed, failed)

purgeDeletedOnScan.description: Purge soft-deleted books after completing a scan

scanMode.description: Default scan mode for scheduled scans ("normal" or "deep")

scanOnStart.description: Scan library when the application starts

SelectCoverSourceRequest.description: Request to select which cover source to use

source.description: Cover source: "default" (first book cover) or "custom" (uploaded cover)

SeriesAverageRatingResponse.description: Response containing the average community rating for a series

average.description: Average rating from all users (0-100 scale), null if no ratings exist

count.description: Total number of user ratings for this series

oneOf.description: Filter by series status (ongoing, ended, hiatus, etc.)
Filter by read status (unread, in_progress, read)

SeriesCondition.description:
Series-level search conditions

Conditions can be composed using `allOf` (AND) and `anyOf` (OR).
Uses untagged enum for cleaner JSON without explicit type field.

isSelected.description: Whether this cover is currently selected as the primary cover

updatedAt.description: When the cover was last updated

SeriesCoverListResponse.description: Response containing a list of series covers

libraryName.description: Name of the library this series belongs to

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman, following Bruce Wayne's first year as a vigilante.

condition.description: Filter condition (optional - no condition returns all)

fullTextSearch.description: Full-text search query (case-insensitive search on series name)

readingDirection.description: Reading direction (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

status.description: Series status (ongoing, ended, hiatus, abandoned, unknown)

summary.example: The definitive origin story of Batman.

totalBookCount.description: Expected total book count (for ongoing series)

SeriesStrategy.description:
Series scanning strategy type for library organization

Determines how series are detected and organized from the filesystem structure.

SetPreferenceRequest.description: Request to set a single preference value

updated.description: Number of preferences that were updated

SetSeriesGenresRequest.description: Request to set genres for a series

genres.description:
List of genre names to set for the series
Genres that don't exist will be created automatically

SetSeriesSharingTagsRequest.description: Bulk set series sharing tags request

sharingTagIds.description: List of sharing tag IDs to apply to the series

SetSeriesTagsRequest.description: Request to set tags for a series

tags.description:
List of tag names to set for the series
Tags that don't exist will be created automatically

SetUserRatingRequest.description: Request to create or update a user's rating for a series

notes.example: Great series, loved the art style!

rating.description:
Rating value (1-100, typically set via 1-10 slider multiplied by 10)

In the UI, display as 1-10 with 0.5 step increments.
Multiply UI value by 10 before sending (e.g., 7.5 → 75).

SetUserSharingTagGrantRequest.description: Set user sharing tag grant request

sharingTagId.description: Sharing tag ID to grant access to

is_sensitive.description: Whether value should be masked in responses

updated_at.description: When the setting was last updated

updated_by.description: User who last updated the setting

value_type.description: Data type of the value (string, integer, boolean, etc.)

ip_address.description: IP address of the user who made the change

setting_id.description: ID of the setting that was changed

hasUsers.description: Whether any users exist in the database

name.description: Display name of the sharing tag

seriesCount.description: Number of series tagged with this sharing tag

userCount.description: Number of users with grants for this sharing tag

SharingTagListResponse.description: Response for list of sharing tags

SharingTagSummaryDto.description: Simplified sharing tag for lists (without counts)

name.description: Display name of the sharing tag

SmartBookConfig.description: Configuration for smart book naming strategy

additionalGenericPatterns.description: Additional patterns to consider as "generic" titles (beyond defaults)

SystemIntegrationDto.description: A system integration (credentials are never exposed)

errorMessage.description: Error message if health check failed

hasCredentials.description: Whether credentials have been set (actual credentials are never returned)

healthStatus.description: Health status: unknown, healthy, degraded, unhealthy, disabled

integrationType.description: Integration type: metadata_provider, notification, storage, sync

lastHealthCheckAt.description: When the last health check was performed

lastSyncAt.description: When the integration last synced data

updatedAt.description: When the integration was last updated

SystemIntegrationsListResponse.description: Response containing a list of system integrations

seriesCount.description: Number of series with this tag

TagListResponse.description: Response containing a list of tags

count.description: Number of tasks in this period

TaskMetricsResponse.description: Task metrics response - current performance statistics

updated_at.description: When the metrics were last updated

TaskMetricsSummaryDto.description: Summary metrics across all task types

avg_queue_wait_ms.description: Average queue wait time in milliseconds

total_executed.description: Total tasks executed since last restart

TaskProgress.description: Progress information for a running task

TaskProgressEvent.description: Task progress event for background operations

book_id.description: Book ID if this task is related to a book

completed_at.description: When the task completed (success or failure)

library_id.description: Library ID if this task is related to a library

series_id.description: Series ID if this task is related to a series

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task instance

last_error.description: Error message from last failed attempt

locked_by.description: Worker ID that has locked this task

scheduled_for.description: When the task is scheduled to run

by_type.description: Breakdown by task type and status

pending.description: Total counts across all task types

oneOf.description: Scan a library for new/changed books
Analyze all books in a series (always forces re-analysis)
Purge soft-deleted books from a library

Generate thumbnails for books in a scope (library, series, or all)
This is a fan-out task that enqueues individual GenerateThumbnail tasks
Generate thumbnail for a single book
Find and catalog duplicate books across all libraries
Clean up files for a deleted book (thumbnail + cover references)

thumbnail_path.description: Optional thumbnail path (if known at deletion time)

oneOf.description: Clean up files for a deleted series (cover files)
Scan filesystem for orphaned files and delete them

TaskType.description: Task types supported by the distributed task queue

TaskTypeMetricsDto.description: Metrics for a specific task type

avg_queue_wait_ms.description: Average queue wait time in milliseconds

TaskTypeStats.description: Statistics for a specific task type

TokenResponse.description: Token response (for refresh tokens in future)

TriggerCleanupResponse.description: Response when triggering a cleanup task

task_id.description: ID of the queued cleanup task

TriggerDuplicateScanResponse.description: Response for triggering a duplicate scan

task_id.description: Task ID for tracking the scan progress

TriggerScanQuery.description: Query parameters for triggering a scan

UpdateAlternateTitleRequest.description: Request to update an alternate title

permissions.description: Permissions for the API key (array of permission strings)

UpdateLibraryRequest.description:
Update library request

Note: series_strategy and series_config are immutable after library creation.
book_strategy, book_config, number_strategy, and number_config can be updated.

oneOf.description:
Book naming strategy (mutable)
Options: filename, metadata_first, smart, series_name

defaultReadingDirection.description: Default reading direction for books in this library (ltr, rtl, ttb or webtoon)

oneOf.description:
Book number strategy (mutable)
Options: file_order, metadata, filename, smart

UpdateMetadataLocksRequest.description: Request to update metadata lock states

ageRating.description: Whether to lock the age_rating field

customMetadata.description: Whether to lock the custom_metadata field

imprint.description: Whether to lock the imprint field

language.description: Whether to lock the language field

publisher.description: Whether to lock the publisher field

readingDirection.description: Whether to lock the reading_direction field

status.description: Whether to lock the status field

summary.description: Whether to lock the summary field

title.description: Whether to lock the title field

titleSort.description: Whether to lock the title_sort field

totalBookCount.description: Whether to lock the total_book_count field

year.description: Whether to lock the year field

UpdateProgressRequest.description: Request to update reading progress for a book

completed.description: Whether the book is marked as completed

progress_percentage.description: Progress as a percentage (0.0-1.0), used for EPUB books with reflowable content

change_reason.description: Optional reason for the change (for audit log)

description.description: New description (set to null to remove)
description.example: Content appropriate for the whole family

UpdateSystemIntegrationRequest.description: Request to update a system integration

credentials.description:
Updated credentials (will be encrypted before storage)
Set to null to clear credentials, omit to keep unchanged

UserDetailDto.description: User detail DTO with sharing tag grants (for single user view)

sharingTags.description: Sharing tag grants for this user

UserIntegrationDto.description: A user integration (credentials are never exposed)

connected.description: Whether the integration is connected (has credentials)

externalUserId.description: External user ID from the provider

syncStatus.description: Current sync status: idle, syncing, error, rate_limited

updatedAt.description: When the integration was last updated

UserIntegrationsListResponse.description: Response containing a list of user integrations

available.description: Available integrations that user can connect

updatedAt.description: When the preference was last updated

valueType.description: The value type: string, integer, float, boolean, or json

UserRatingsListResponse.description: Response containing a list of user ratings

UserRole.description:
User roles for role-based access control (RBAC)

Roles define a base set of permissions that users inherit.
Custom permissions can be added on top of role permissions (union behavior).

UserSeriesRatingDto.description: User series rating data transfer object

notes.example: Great series, loved the art style!

rating.description: Rating value (1-100, displayed as 1-10 in UI with 0.1 precision)

updatedAt.description: When the rating was last updated

UserSharingTagGrantDto.description: User sharing tag grant data transfer object

UserSharingTagGrantsResponse.description: Response for user's sharing tag grants

UuidOperator.description: Operators for UUID comparisons (library_id, series_id, etc.)

accessToken.description: JWT access token (user can now login)
